context: Tests whether the agent builds an Elasticsearch function_score query following the prescribed structure, score modes, default boosts, field weights, and fuzziness, plus whether audit logging captures the required fields.

checklist.name: function_score structure
checklist.description: The query uses an Elasticsearch function_score query structure (top-level key is 'function_score')

checklist.name: score_mode multiply
checklist.description: The function_score query sets score_mode to 'multiply'

checklist.name: boost_mode multiply
checklist.description: The function_score query sets boost_mode to 'multiply'

checklist.name: Weight multiplier formula
checklist.description: Merchandising boost percentages are converted to weight multipliers using 1 + (value / 100) — e.g. a +60 boost becomes weight 1.6

checklist.name: multi_match base query
checklist.description: The base query inside function_score is a multi_match query

checklist.name: Field boosts title^3 tags^2
checklist.description: multi_match includes title with boost ^3 and tags with boost ^2 (i.e. 'title^3' and 'tags^2' in the fields array)

checklist.name: Default in-stock boost
checklist.description: A default function is always added that boosts in-stock products (inventory_quantity > 0) with weight 1.5

checklist.name: Default image boost
checklist.description: A default function is always added that boosts products with a featured_image field with weight 1.1

checklist.name: Audit userId
checklist.description: Audit log entry includes the admin user ID (userId or equivalent field)

checklist.name: Audit action and resource
checklist.description: Audit log entry includes both an action name (e.g. 'merchandising_rule_created') and a resource identifier referencing the rule (e.g. 'rule:<id>')

checklist.name: Audit rule details
checklist.description: Audit log entry includes rule details such as rule name and rule type
